input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.8.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.8.7
            TITLE: the front hoop bracing, main hoop bracing and main hoop bracing supports may use only

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.8.7: The Front Hoop Bracing, Main Hoop Bracing and Main Hoop Bracing Supports may use only
F.7.8.7 The Front Hoop Bracing, Main Hoop Bracing and Main Hoop Bracing Supports may use only 
one 10 mm or 3/8” minimum diameter Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2 as an alternative to F.7.8.5 
above if the bolt is on the centerline of the bracing tube to prevent loading the bolt in 
bending, similar to the figure below.

final_answer: The Front Hoop Bracing, Main Hoop Bracing and Main Hoop Bracing Supports may use only one 10 mm or 3/8” minimum diameter Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2 as an alternative to F.7.8.5 above if the bolt is on the centerline of the bracing tube to prevent loading the bolt in bending, similar to the figure below.
